steps.title: Use the mental shortcut
steps.content:
Finding $10\%$ is the same as moving the decimal one place left:
$$370 \rightarrow 37.0$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice C is $90\%$ of $370$, and choice D is $370-10$. The value of $10\%$ of $370$ is $37$.

steps.title: Answer
steps.content: $37$ matches choice B, so B is correct.
